steps.title: Find the number of bags sold at \$13
steps.content: The price increases from \$11 to \$13, a difference of \$2. Since the club sells 9 fewer bags for every \$1 price increase, the total reduction is $2 \times 9 = 18$ fewer bags. Therefore, at \$13, they will sell $90 - 18 = 72$ bags.

steps.title: Calculate revenue at the new price
steps.content:
Revenue is price $\times$ number sold. At \$13 per bag with 72 bags sold:
$$13 \times 72 = 936$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
